name: Production Kanban (WASM)
description: Visual kanban board tracking entity production status with drag-and-drop workflow, color-coded cards, filtering, and production pipeline stats.
author: BiloxiStudios

columns.label: Kanban Columns
columns.description: Comma-separated column names for the board

wip_limits.label: WIP Limits
wip_limits.description: Comma-separated WIP limits per column (0 = unlimited). Must match column count.

entity_types.label: Entity Types
entity_types.description: Comma-separated entity types to show on the board

show_thumbnails.label: Show Thumbnails
show_thumbnails.description: Display entity portrait thumbnails on cards

status_field.label: Status Field Name
status_field.description: YAML frontmatter field used to track production status
